plot outline: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.
title: The Ugly Truth
akas: La vérité toute crue (Canada, French title)

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
Teamsters - Motion Picture & Theatrical Trade Division
